inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Text to Summarize
inputs.description: Long-form content to condense into a summary.

inputs.name: model
inputs.label: Model Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured model at runtime.

inputs.name: length
inputs.label: Length Override
inputs.description: One of: short, medium, long — overrides the configured length.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Summary
outputs.description: AI-generated summary of the input text.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the AI call failed.
